summary: Completed testing of mobile Hero section optimizations for bringsai.io. Mobile enhanced glow effect and logo positioning working correctly. Desktop view preserved as required.

design_issues.issue: Company logos extend slightly beyond viewport on shorter desktop screens (800px height)
design_issues.impact: Logos are cut off on desktop with 800px height, but become fully visible with minimal scroll
design_issues.note: This may be intentional design behavior as logos become visible with minimal scroll

passed_tests: Mobile view (390x844): Enhanced glow effect visible and stronger than desktop
Mobile view: Company logos partially visible at bottom (cut off as intended)
Desktop view: Mobile-only enhanced glow correctly hidden
Desktop view: Default subtle glow preserved
Responsive behavior: Media queries working correctly
CSS implementation: Mobile-only styles applied only on mobile devices
Glow intensity comparison: Mobile shows 0.35 opacity vs desktop 0.15 opacity
Logo positioning: Mobile logos extend beyond viewport as intended
